package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for handler_calls_gorm_directly_outside_repository: Handler packages that import `gorm.io/gorm` and build query chains directly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule070NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule070NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule070NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario070Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule070NegativeService, input Rule070NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
